title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Finolex Cables

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Finolex Cables
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Cables are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Cables:
Finolex Cables is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables!
